scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:1420 && set LOCAL_PLAN_DEV=1&& electron ."
scripts.package:win: npm run build && electron-packager . "Local Plan" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out ../../outputs --overwrite --icon public/icon.ico --ignore "^/src-tauri($|/)" --ignore "^/scripts/capture-electron\.cjs$" --ignore "^/local-plan-screenshot\.png$" --ignore "^/desktop-start\..*\.log$"
